### Product Information

- Highly effective, streak free glass cleaner

- Encapsulates dirt and grime for safe removal

- Do not apply in direct sunlight or on hot glass, otherwise streaking may occur

- Product Codes: GY-3408, GY-3439

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

91% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 11 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

Gyeon Glass will help you clean your glass, leaving a streak free shine! Contamination naturally accumulates on both the interior and exterior glass faster than you may think. Dirt and grime can stick to the micro pores of your glass almost instantaneously and once it bonds to the glass, this contamination can be a pain to remove. It can also cause light to fragment, which can cause dangerous driving conditions. The quality cleaning agents in Gyeon Glass, will encapsulate nasty dirt and grime buildups and lubricate the surface, allowing you to safely and easily remove contamination. After use, you will be left with crystal clear glass surfaces, no smudges or streaks! For best results, Gyeon recommends applying nice and thin, out of the sun, and only on glass surfaces that are cool to the touch. Gyeon Glass will not affect previously applied rain repellents, making it a great maintenance cleaner. Grab a bottle of the Gyeon Glass today and keep your glass clean!



**Important: This item cannot be shipped, sold, or used in the state of California. CARB in California claims this item breaks their VOC regulations.**

### Professional Detailer Reviews

I would like to start by saying if you expect me to tell you that I found a magical glass cleaner that would guarantee streak-free windows and walk on water, that is not going to happen. Not even close! A great technical process is still important. I am human, and still can be frustrated with this chore. But I like Gyeon Glass enough to call it my new favorite and currently the only dedicated glass cleaner that I use.

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/20191214_063748-1024x768-1-300x147.jpg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-glass-my-current-favorite-glass-cleaner/)

- [Gyeon Glass: My Current Favorite Glass Cleaner](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-glass-my-current-favorite-glass-cleaner/) by [Rodney Tatum](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/rodney-tatum/)

Achieving streak free glass is the holy grail of car detailing. With Gyeon Glass, I was able to experience just that, a highly effective glass cleaner that delivers impressive results with minimal effort.

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Gyeon-Glass-Featured-Image-300x147.jpeg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-glass-a-high-performance-glass-cleaner/)

- [Gyeon Glass: A High-Performance Glass Cleaner](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-glass-a-high-performance-glass-cleaner/) by [Reece @ DI](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/reece/)

### Videos

#### GYEON Q M Glass

![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/qJYFOtoftM4/hqdefault.jpg)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Streak and smudge free quality glass cleaner. Crystal clear view.


**


- Clear view

- Safe on all surfaces

- Leaves no streaks
**


#### Directions

Q2M Glass Cleaner will not affect your hydrophobic rain repellent. Spray onto a Q2M GlassWipe Evo and clean the surface. Give the surface a quick wipe with a dry part of the towel. 

** DO NOT WORK IN DIRECT SUNLIGHT. DO NOT SPRAY ON HOT GLASS. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.**
